rationale: Classification is conservative and rule-based; candidates are not confirmed bottlenecks.
next_best_action: Compare two or three candidate architectures with a screening model.
do_not_do_first: Do not optimize diamond thickness before bounding interface resistance.
Do not treat pattern selection as a validated recommendation.

triggered_rules.finding: Interface resistance is not bounded for an interface-sensitive route.
triggered_rules.action_enabled: Bound or measure interface thermal resistance.

triggered_rules.finding: Multiple routes remain plausible without a validated winner.
